top_stories.title: A Framework for Low-Latency, LLM-driven Multimodal Interaction on the Pepper Robot
top_stories.summary: arXiv:2603.21013v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Despite recent advances in integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) into social robotics, two weaknesses persist. First, existing implementations on platforms like Pepper often rely on cascaded Speech-to-Text (STT)->LLM->Text-to-Speech (TTS) pipelines, resulting in high latency and the loss of paralin
top_stories.technical_takeaway: Signals incremental evolution rather than a paradigm shift in current AI systems.
top_stories.primary_risk: Unclear production readiness despite promising early results.
top_stories.primary_opportunity: Practical improvements when layered onto existing AI workflows.

top_stories.title: Popular AI proxy LiteLLM got hacked with malware that spreads through Kubernetes clusters
top_stories.summary: LiteLLM, a popular open-source proxy for AI APIs, has been compromised with malware that steals credentials and spreads across cloud systems. NVIDIA AI Director Jim Fan warns this represents a new class of attacks targeting AI agents. top_stories.technical_takeaway: Agent orchestration is emerging as a new software abstraction layer.
top_stories.primary_risk: Debugging complexity and cascading failures in agentic systems.
top_stories.primary_opportunity: End-to-end automation of complex cognitive workflows.

top_stories.title: Agile Robots and Google Deepmind team up to bring AI-powered robots to factories
top_stories.summary: Agile Robots and Google Deepmind are partnering to build AI-powered robots for industrial use. The Munich-based company will integrate Deepmind's Gemini Robotics models into its hardware. The article Agile Robots and Google Deepmind team up to bring AI-powered robots to factories appeared first on The Decoder.
top_stories.technical_takeaway: Hardware and energy constraints now shape model design decisions.
top_stories.primary_risk: Compute scaling limited by physical and energy infrastructure.

top_stories.title: Securing AI systems under today’s and tomorrow’s conditions
top_stories.summary: Evidence cited in an eBook titled “AI Quantum Resilience”, published by Utimaco [email wall], shows organisations consider security risks as the leading barrier to effective adoption of AI on data they hold.
